name: designviz
description: DesignViz — Interactive Software Engineering Design Concepts Teacher

scripts.lint: npx eslint@8 --no-eslintrc --env browser,es2022 --global RateLimiterAlgorithm --global CircuitBreakerAlgorithm --rule '{"no-undef": "error", "no-unused-vars": "warn"}' --ignore-pattern '*-algorithm.js' --ignore-pattern '*-algorithm.test.js' --ignore-pattern 'run-tests.js' rate-limiter.js circuit-breaker.js
